input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.15 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.15
            TITLE: other side tube requirements

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.15: Other Side Tube Requirements
F.5.15 Other Side Tube Requirements  
If there is a Roll Hoop Brace or other frame tube alongside the driver, at the height of the neck 
of any of the team’s drivers, a metal tube or piece of sheet metal must be attached to the 
Frame 
This is intended to prevent the drivers’ shoulders from passing under the Roll Hoop Brace or 
frame tube, and the driver’s neck contacting this brace or tube.

final_answer: rule F.5.15: Other Side Tube Requirements F.5.15 Other Side Tube Requirements If there is a Roll Hoop Brace or other frame tube alongside the driver, at the height of the neck of any of the team’s drivers, a metal tube or piece of sheet metal must be attached to the Frame This is intended to prevent the drivers’ shoulders from passing under the Roll Hoop Brace or frame tube, and the driver’s neck contacting this brace or tube.
